method: Prices from Inceptron's unauthenticated OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (pricing.prompt / pricing.completion in USD per token x 1e6; input_cache_reads is the cache-read tier), cross-checked against OpenRouter endpoint data where provider_name=='Inceptron'. On 2026-07-12 the API lists 4 priced text LLMs: GLM 5.2 $0.95/$3.04, Kimi K2.7 Code $0.72/$3.50, Kimi K2.6 $0.66/$3.41, and MiniMax M2.5 $0.15/$0.90. GLM 5.1 has not returned. OpenRouter confirms the first three live routes. HQ Sweden (SE), datacenter Finland (FI) per OpenRouter provider metadata.

models.notes: fp4 quant, 1,048,576 context. Cache read $0.18/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.2. Native API and OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint agree at $0.95/$3.04 on 2026-07-12.

int4 quant, 262,144 context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.15/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.7-Code. Native API and OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint agree at $0.72/$3.50 on 2026-07-12.

int4 quant, 262,144 context, multimodal (text+image input). Cache read $0.15/1M. Inceptron model id moonshotai/Kimi-K2.6. Native API and OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint agree at $0.66/$3.41 on 2026-07-12.
fp8 quant, 196,608 context. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Native API is authoritative; $0.15/$0.90 on 2026-07-12.
